title: CRH Announces Intention to Delist from the LSE and Cancel Preference Shares
content:
This document contains inside information NEW YORK – Mar. 13, 2026 – CRH (NYSE: CRH), the leading provider of building materials, today announces its intention to delist from the London Stock Exchange (LSE) its ordinary shares and 7% preference shares (the “LSE Delisting”) and, subject to shareholder approval, to cancel CRH’s 5% and 7% preference […]
